verdict: 2026-07-21 22:15 PDT — Sound and idiomatic. I would build it this way: clamp both existing return paths with Math.max(0, …) and keep the regression cases in the existing unit suite. The change introduces no unnecessary abstraction, dependency, state, or framework-level workaround. Focused tests could not execute because the read-only sandbox prevented Vite from creating its temporary config file.
